mapper.select:
-- ver2 템플릿 목록 SELECT a.TMPLET_ID , a.TMPLET_NM , a.TMPLET_EXPL , a.USE_YN , a.DEL_ABL_YN , ( SELECT count(*) FROM PM_CONFIG_DTS WHERE TMPLET_ID = a.TMPLET_ID ) CONF_COUNT , TO_CHAR(a.STM_FIR_REG_DATE,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') STM_FIR_REG_DATE , a.STM_FIR_REG_USER_ID ,(SELECT NVL(MAX(b.USER_NM),'manual') FROM AD_USER_MST b WHERE b.USER_ID = a.STM_FIR_REG_USER_ID) STM_FIR_REG_USER_NM , TO_CHAR(a.STM_LAST_UPD_DATE,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') STM_LAST_UPD_DATE , a.STM_LAST_UPD_USER_ID ,(SELECT NVL(MAX(c.USER_NM),'manual') FROM AD_USER_MST c WHERE c.USER_ID = a.STM_LAST_UPD_USER_ID) STM_LAST_UPD_USER_NM ,NVL(TO_CHAR(b.SYNC_PRG_TO_DATE,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI'),'-') SYNC_LAST_DATE , b.SYNC_PRG_STS_CD ,CASE WHEN b.SYNC_PRG_STS_CD = '02' THEN CASE WHEN b.SYNC_PRG_TO_DATE >= NVL(d.SUB_STM_LAST_UPD_DATE, b.SYNC_PRG_TO_DATE) THEN C.CD_NM ELSE (SELECT CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD WHERE COMM_GRP_CD = 'SYNC_PRG_STS_CD' AND COMM_CD = '00') --'동기화 미진행 ' END WHEN b.SYNC_PRG_STS_CD = c.COMM_CD THEN C.CD_NM ELSE '-' END SYNC_PRG_STS_NM ,(CASE WHEN b.SYNC_RQS_USER_ID IS NULL THEN '-' ELSE (SELECT NVL(MAX(b.USER_NM),'manual') FROM AD_USER_MST b WHERE b.USER_ID = b.SYNC_RQS_USER_ID) END) SYNC_RQS_USER_NM ,null AUTO_KEYS FROM PM_TMPLET_MST a , ( -- 동기화 마지막 seq SELECT * FROM PM_TMPLET_SYNC_DTS WHERE (TMPLET_ID, SYNC_SEQ) IN ( SELECT TMPLET_ID, max(SYNC_SEQ) AS SYNC_SEQ FROM PM_TMPLET_SYNC_DTS GROUP BY TMPLET_ID ) ) b , ( SELECT COMM_CD, CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD WHERE COMM_GRP_CD = 'SYNC_PRG_STS_CD' ) c , ( -- 템플릿의 sub 키별 가장 최종 수정일 .. SELECT a.TMPLET_ID , ( SELECT max(b.STM_LAST_UPD_DATE) AS SUB_STM_LAST_UPD_DATE FROM PM_TMPLET_SUBVAL_MAP b WHERE a.TMPLET_ID = b.TMPLET_ID GROUP BY b.TMPLET_ID
) SUB_STM_LAST_UPD_DATE FROM PM_TMPLET_MST a WHERE a.DEL_YN ='N' ) d WHERE 1=1 AND a.TMPLET_ID = b.TMPLET_ID(+) AND a.TMPLET_ID = d.TMPLET_ID AND b.SYNC_PRG_STS_CD = c.COMM_CD(+)
AND LOWER(TMPLET_NM) LIKE '%'||LOWER(#{tmpletNm})||'%'
AND NVL(a.DEL_YN,'N') = 'N' ORDER BY a.STM_LAST_UPD_DATE DESC
SELECT a.AUTO_KEY_ID, a.AUTO_KEY_NM FROM PM_TMPLET_AUTOKEY_BAS a WHERE 1=1 AND USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT a.TMPLET_ID , d.CD_NM AS SUB_VAL_TYP_NM , b.SUB_KEY , b.SUB_VAL_SEQ AS SELECT_SUB_VAL_SEQ , c.SUB_VAL_SEQ , c.SUB_VAL , NVL( DECODE(b.SUB_VAL_SEQ, c.SUB_VAL_SEQ, 'Y'), 'N') AS IS_SELECT , 'Y' EXST_YN FROM PM_TMPLET_MST a, PM_TMPLET_SUBKEY_MAP b, PM_TMPLET_SUBVAL_MAP c, (SELECT * FROM AD_COMM_CD WHERE COMM_GRP_CD = 'SUB_VAL_TYP_CD') d WHERE 1=1 AND a.TMPLET_ID = b.TMPLET_ID AND b.TMPLET_ID = c.TMPLET_ID AND b.SUB_KEY = c.SUB_KEY AND b.SUB_VAL_TYP_CD = d.COMM_CD AND a.TMPLET_ID = #{tmpletId} AND b.SUB_VAL_TYP_CD = #{subValTypCd} AND b.SUB_KEY = #{subKey} AND b.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SUB_VAL_SEQ
SELECT count(*) FROM PM_TMPLET_SUBKEY_MAP WHERE TMPLET_ID = #{value} AND SYNC_SUB_VAL_SEQ IS NULL
